Build the SP gauge during battle to unleash powerful special abilities, and expend it all at once to trigger devastating combo attacks with your allies.
70010000103228.intro: Explore isometric dungeons and master evolving skills in a classic JRPG
70010000103228.name: Tears Revolude

70010000104937.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Hujeong Auditorium, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
High-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery. MasCon for Nintendo Switch™ made by Zuiki of Japan is also supported.
70010000104937.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Hujeong Auditorium

70010000105625.description:
Step into a world where love, temptation, and fate collide.

A mysterious demon appears before you with a chilling challenge: win the heart of your university professor… or be dragged into the depths of hell.

As your conversations grow more intimate, your every word shapes your destiny.

Will you follow the demon’s wicked game, or defy him and choose your own path?

Your choices matter... and every ending reveals a different truth about desire, freedom, and the price of love.


Features:

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Every path leads to a different fate. And a different version of you.

● CHOICE & CONSEQUENCE: What you say changes everything, even who survives.

● SUPERNATURAL ROMANCE: A love story twisted by temptation, mystery, and desire.

● ATMOSPHERIC EXPERIENCE: Stunning art and haunting music that draw you into the dark.


It’s seductive.
It’s dangerous.
It’s your soul on the line.

Are you ready to play her game?
70010000105625.intro:
What if the price of love… was your soul?
Make your choice… before it’s made for you.
70010000105625.name: Anime School Love: Her Teacher's Secret Lesson

70010000111323.description:
Brave Rounds is a fast-paced, close range-heavy vertical scrolling shoot 'em up with the beauty and ruthless precision of 00s arcade classics. Shoot them up by yourself or co-op together with a friend!

Master the art of getting closer and beat the heck out of them!

Play as one of three playable characters accompanied with their Options. Shoot the wide shot, focus shot, deploy the bombs, or unleash their special!

You don't have to fight alone; get a friend and play together in Two Player where they control the Options directly! Or control both characters at once with just one controller with Dual Control!

Brave Rounds tells a touching story of inter-generational relationships and the lengths people take to accomplish their goals. Set in the occult and sci-fi-laden modern era of 20XX, Brave Rounds explores the worth in fighting for what you believe in.

Features:
- Arcade Mode, the game's main mode of high-intensity five stages action. Fight the mid-bosses, bosses, and watch out for the dynamic difficulty: Rank! Are you worthy enough to face the True Last Boss...?
- Stage Practice, for your practicing convenience. Whenever you get stuck at Arcade Mode, visit the Stage Practice.
- Story Mode, telling a different story from Arcade Mode, is where you tackle 41 bite-sized stages. Complete the challenges, get the stars, upgrade your strength. Explore the world of Brave Rounds and the motivations behind the characters in lively and animated Visual Novel-style cutscenes!
- Score Attack. Get the high score in the Score Attack-exclusive stage within the 3 minutes time limit! Dare to put the gas on the pedal and raise the rank to its limit?
- Inspired by 00s video games and animes, Brave Rounds features smooth, hi-res hand-drawn art and animations. Colorful and expressive! Watching their movements is key to success.
- Enjoy the soundtrack of various genres by Dicky Teja Pratama, Jasson Prestiliano and Scowsh!
- Screen scaling options including TATE / Vertical mode, rebindable conrols, and replays!
70010000111323.intro: Shoot, punch and get closer through bullets and enemies in this close range-heavy arcade bullet hell shoot 'em up!
70010000111323.name: Brave Rounds

70010000111766.description:
A table tennis legend meets a rhythm game! Hit every ball precisely in time, keep to the beat and let the rhythm guide your shots. Master Timo Boll's legendary techniques, challenge charismatic rivals in urban locations and create perfect combos. Every shot counts – your sense of rhythm will be crucial!

• 77 songs, 7 genres – pop, hip-hop/RnB, rock, electro, chill-out, country and kids' music
• Professional moves from Timo Boll – train with a world-class player
• Reflexes and timing – focus and stay sharp 
• Combos and hiscores – play a perfect series of shots
• Stylish arenas – industrial areas, train stations and many more
70010000111766.intro: Feel the beat. Hit the ball.
70010000111766.name: Timo Boll Beats

70010000111924.description:
SP(L/R)ITE is an adventure game where you must escape a series of mysterious floating rooms in another dimension.

Uncover the secrets hidden within each room as you collaborate with an unnervingly energetic goddess and a neighbor you can only speak to through the wall.

What lies beyond the final door? That’s for you to decide.

Sp(L/R)ite unfolds within a locked, crumbling house—an isolated, otherworldly space born from an unforeseen tangling of the “threads of fate” spun by Akrida.

To move from one room to the next, you’ll need to gather scattered items and piece together a mysterious picture—the key to your escape—guided by clues from Jean and Akrida.

With each image you complete, Jean’s and your lost memories begin to surface, slowly revealing your intertwined pasts and drawing you closer to the story’s end.

What future lies ahead for you two? That depends on the choices you make.
70010000111924.intro: Together, you’ll unravel the secrets of this surreal space in this adventure game. Which door will you choose—and where will it lead?
70010000111924.name: SP(L/R)ITE

70010000118771.description:
Climb the branches of knowledge in Nature’s Question, an engaging quiz that turns curiosity about the natural world into a journey of growth and challenge. Guided by Sylvaran, the forest’s guardian spirit, you must answer questions to restore the strength of the Ancient Tree and reach the top of its majestic living tower.

Each correct answer strengthens the tree and lets you advance through its floors, while mistakes end the journey and invite you to try again. As you climb higher, questions become more challenging and time becomes more precious, demanding focus, quick thinking, and strategic decisions.

Use your points to activate powerful aids at the right moment, overcoming obstacles and keeping your ascent alive. With shuffled questions in every run and dynamic progression, each playthrough offers a new opportunity to prove your knowledge.

Relax in nature-inspired environments, challenge your mind, and discover how far your knowledge can take you. In Nature’s Question, every answer brings you one step closer to the top of the Ancient Tree.
70010000118771.intro: Climb the Ancient Tree and test your knowledge of nature
70010000118771.name: Nature's Question

70010000119142.description:
Welcome to a maid café where the service is as charming as it is unexpected.

In Maid-Sama Cafe: Anime Boys Services in Cute Outfits, a team of handsome anime boys is ready to serve customers in adorable maid outfits. Behind the smiles, playful teasing, and stylish uniforms lies a café full of energy, fun, and irresistible charm.

Help the boys keep the café running through a series of fast and entertaining minigames. Serve drinks, prepare desserts, and assist the staff as they entertain guests with confidence and personality.

Each boy has his own unique style, attitude, and playful charm. As you improve your scores, you’ll unlock new illustrations and discover more about the cafe’s most charismatic staff members.

Relax, enjoy the atmosphere, and spend time with the cutest maids you never expected.


FEATURES:

● CHARMING MAID BOYS: Meet anime boys in cute maid outfits with unique personalities and playful attitudes.

● FUN MINIGAMES: Complete a variety of fast-paced café minigames based on timing and reflexes.

● UNLOCKABLE GALLERY: Progress through the game to unlock collectible illustrations.

● COLORFUL ANIME STYLE: Expressive characters and vibrant visuals bring the café to life.

● EASY TO PLAY: Simple controls designed for quick and enjoyable sessions.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Improve your scores and unlock all the cafe’s secrets.


The café is open.
Your favourite maid might be a boy.
70010000119142.intro:
The cutest café just got a little more dangerous.
Charming anime boys serving with style.
Are you ready for the sweetest service in town?
70010000119142.name: Maid-Sama Cafe: Anime Boys Services in Cute Outfits

70010000119681.description:
Welcome to a revolutionary puzzle experience where the logic of nonograms meets the artistry of Jigsaw Puzzles. Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World invites you to restore a legendary painting through a unique two-step puzzle adventure, perfect for cozy gaming sessions and mental training.

Unlock a Masterpiece, Two Ways
Each of the 250+ puzzles is a dual-layered challenge. First, engage your logical mind with a satisfying nonogram grid to reveal clues for the second phase where you shift your thinking as you arrange pieces of the image into a cohesive jigsaw to reveal one section of The Topsy Turvy World painting by Pieter Bruegel the Elder. 

Featuring calming music to sooth the mind as you take on increasingly difficult puzzles, Topsy Turvy World ramps up the challenge so that players of all skill levels can test their logic skills. 

With over 250 individual puzzles, players will have plenty to sink their teeth into while constantly working toward the ultimate goal of completing the larger tapestry. Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World is perfect for keeping your brain sharp.

A new puzzle adventure awaits!
70010000119681.intro:
A Fresh Mix Of Classic Nonogram And Jigsaw Puzzles.
Flex your puzzle skills and master nonogram and jigsaw challenges!
70010000119681.name: Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World

70050000068685.description:
This Battle Pass is seasonal content that introduces new rewards with each season.

By playing and leveling up, you can unlock rewards from the currently active season’s “Nexus Battle Pass.” The exclusive items you earn can be used and exchanged for various customization items.

Five new themes and five characters are included:

• [Haunted Land] Lilith Noctra
• [Victorize Territory]  Isolde Vayne
• [Fluctus Union] Unit-77 “KIRN”
• [Sacred Ring Continent] Rafael Dorne
• [Arena Zone] Sera Veloce

Content included (one set per character):

• Emote
• Battle UI
• Player Icon
• Battle Background
• Loading Screen Background
• Battle BGM

The full version of “SHIKA-Q” is required to play.
This Battle Pass is included in “SHIKA-Q Nexus Edition,” “SHIKA-Q Deluxe Edition,” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70050000068685.name: Nexus Battle Pass

70050000068686.description:
This Battle Pass is seasonal content that introduces new rewards with each season.

By playing and leveling up, you can unlock rewards from the currently active season’s “Premium Battle Pass.” The exclusive items you earn can be used and exchanged for various customization items.

Five new themes and five characters are included:

• [Haunted Land] Silas Mourn
• [Victorize Territory] Edgar Fuchs
• [Fluctus Union Model-XG09 “REGRUS”
• [Sacred Ring Continent]Aldric Weiss
• [Arena Zone]Proto-MX51 “STYX”


Content included (one set per character):

• Emote
• Battle UI
• Player Icon
• Battle Background
• Loading Screen Background
• Battle BGM

The full version of “SHIKA-Q” is required to play.
This Battle Pass is included in “SHIKA-Q Premium Edition,” “SHIKA-Q Deluxe Edition,” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70050000068686.name: Premium Battle Pass

70050000071341.description:
Various custom items usable in SHIKA-Q will be granted free of charge as a pre-order bonus.

Contents
■ Mark of the Pioneer[Blue]_PIcon
■ Mark of the Pioneer[Red]_PIcon
■ Wind Racer
■ Founding Challenger
70050000071341.name: Pre-Order Bonus

70070000033225.description:
This bundle includes the full version of “SHIKA-Q” along with the “Nexus Battle Pass,” which grants access to exclusive rewards.

Engage in ultra-fast competitive puzzle battles on a 10×10 board, where creating Links and making split-second decisions determine victory. The “Nexus Battle Pass” adds season-exclusive customization items, bringing additional style and personality to your matches.

Collect limited-time rewards this season and experience the world of “SHIKA-Q” on a deeper level.

Content
■ Full Game
■ Nexus Battle Pass

Game Features
■ Strategy ×Super Speed × Competitive Play (1–2 Players)

Connect Links on a 10×10 board as offense and defense unfold in real time. Instant decisions determine victory.

Custom settings allow players to adjust the balance between speed and strategy—from slower, thought-focused matches to ultra-high-speed battles.

In addition to Offline Versus, the game also supports Online Battles and Ranked Matches, where split-second judgment determines the winner against players worldwide.

■ Challenge Mode (Single-Player)

A world-ranking-supported solo mode fully synchronized with music.

As stages progress, both the music and gameplay evolve. Manage your health, balance offense and defense, clear all 99 stages, and aim for a high score.

Unlike Versus Mode, this mode emphasizes discovering the optimal solution for each situation.

■ Characters, Worldbuilding & Customization

A diverse cast of characters enhances the competitive experience through unique themes and presentation.

Customize UI design, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, icons, and more to personalize your matches.

Each theme includes dedicated character songs, deepening both musical and narrative immersion.

Tailor the atmosphere to your playstyle and express yourself through battle presentation.

■ DLC Battle Pass – Expanding the Online Experience

The DLC Battle Pass unlocks rewards progressively through mission completion.

It includes premium customization content such as UI designs, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, and icons—enhancing the competitive experience.

The more you play, the more your presentation evolves. Your progress remains visible, supporting a long-term online experience built on growth and achievement.

※ The “SHIKA-Q” full game and the “Nexus Battle Pass” are also sold separately.
※ The full game is included in the “Premium Edition” and “Deluxe Edition,” and the “Nexus Battle Pass” is included in the “Deluxe Edition” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful not to purchase duplicates.
70070000033225.name: SHIKA-Q Nexus Edition

70070000033227.description:
This bundle includes the full version of “SHIKA-Q” along with both the “Nexus Battle Pass” and the “Premium Battle Pass,” each offering access to special rewards.

Engage in ultra-fast competitive puzzle battles on a 10×10 board, where creating Links and making split-second decisions determine victory. Each Battle Pass includes its own set of exclusive customization items, adding even more style and personality to your matches.

Collect season-limited rewards and experience every aspect of “SHIKA-Q” battles to the fullest.

Content
■ Full Game
■ Nexus Battle Pass
■ Premium Battle Pass

Game Features
■ Strategy ×Super Speed × Competitive Play (1–2 Players)

Connect Links on a 10×10 board as offense and defense unfold in real time. Instant decisions determine victory.

Custom settings allow players to adjust the balance between speed and strategy—from slower, thought-focused matches to ultra-high-speed battles.

In addition to Offline Versus, the game also supports Online Battles and Ranked Matches, where split-second judgment determines the winner against players worldwide.

■ Challenge Mode (Single-Player)

A world-ranking-supported solo mode fully synchronized with music.

As stages progress, both the music and gameplay evolve. Manage your health, balance offense and defense, clear all 99 stages, and aim for a high score.

Unlike Versus Mode, this mode emphasizes discovering the optimal solution for each situation.

■ Characters, Worldbuilding & Customization

A diverse cast of characters enhances the competitive experience through unique themes and presentation.

Customize UI design, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, icons, and more to personalize your matches.

Each theme includes dedicated character songs, deepening both musical and narrative immersion.

Tailor the atmosphere to your playstyle and express yourself through battle presentation.

■ DLC Battle Pass – Expanding the Online Experience

The DLC Battle Pass unlocks rewards progressively through mission completion.

It includes premium customization content such as UI designs, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, and icons—enhancing the competitive experience.

The more you play, the more your presentation evolves. Your progress remains visible, supporting a long-term online experience built on growth and achievement.

※Please check before purchasing.
The game, "Nexus Battle Pass," and "Premium Battle Pass" are also available for purchase separately.
Please see below for the contents included in each edition. Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
Game: Included in Nexus Edition, Premium Edition, and Deluxe Edition.
Nexus Battle Pass: Included in Nexus Edition and Battle Pass Set.
Premium Battle Pass: Included in Premium Edition and Battle Pass Set.
70070000033227.name: SHIKA-Q Deluxe Edition

70070000035133.description:
This Battle Pass is seasonal content that introduces new rewards with each season.

By playing and leveling up, you can unlock rewards from the currently active season’s "Nexus Battle Pass" and “Premium Battle Pass.” The exclusive items you earn can be used and exchanged for various customization items.

Ten new themes and Ten characters are included:

• [Weeping Plateau of Night] Lilith Noctra
• [Haunted Land] Silas Mourn
• [Domain of Victorize] Isolde Vayne
• [Victorize Territory] Edgar Fuchs
• [Fluctus Union] Unit-77 “KIRN”
• [Fluctus Union] Model-XG09 “REGRUS”
• [Sacred Ring Continent] Aldric Weiss
• [Sacred Ring Continent] Rafael Dorne
• [Arena Zone] Proto-MX51 “STYX”
• [Arena Zone] Sera Veloce

Content included (one set per character):

• Emote
• Battle UI
• Player Icon
• Battle Background
• Loading Screen Background
• Battle BGM

The full version of “SHIKA-Q” is required to play.
This Battle Pass is included in “SHIKA-Q Nexus Edition,” “SHIKA-Q Premium Edition,” “SHIKA-Q Deluxe Edition,” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70070000035133.name: Battle Pass Set

70010000100286.description:
Veins of DARKNESS Horror is a first-person horror experience where you play as an ordinary shift worker sent on a routine business trip. Your company rents you a house on the outskirts of town — quiet, isolated, and seemingly perfect for a short stay. But soon it becomes clear that something about this place is deeply wrong.

The atmosphere grows heavier with every passing moment. The deeper you explore, the more unsettling secrets begin to surface.

Along the way, you will encounter a variety of challenging and unusual puzzles that must be solved to uncover the truth and move forward. Each discovery pulls you further into the mystery hidden within the house.

Prepare for an intense horror experience where every step feels uncertain and every new corner may reveal something you wish you had never found.
70010000100286.intro: The truth lives in the darkness...
70010000100286.name: Veins of DARKNESS Horror

70010000118525.description:
Take control of Hiko, a young ninja, and his shadow doubles as you solve puzzles, defeat enemies, and save your village from the sinister monk Doku.

In a distant bamboo village lies the Stone of Life — a source of strength and harmony. When the evil monk Doku steals it, young ninja Hiko sets out on a perilous journey to retrieve the stolen relic and restore peace.

Ninjora Echoes is a 2D platformer built around the unique mechanic of creating and controlling shadow clones. You won’t just jump and fight — you’ll need to plan every move strategically. Your clones can press switches, hold levers, and distract enemies, opening up clever new ways to overcome each challenge.

Hiko’s ability to transfer his soul into any of his clones lets you coordinate multiple characters at once, solving intricate puzzles where every shadow plays a vital role. Use your clones to build vertical towers, reach hidden platforms, and outsmart deadly traps.
Combat combines precision and tactics — throw shurikens, strike in close combat, and master ninja skills to defeat enemies. Each level is a test of skill and strategy, leading up to epic boss battles — including the final showdown with Doku himself.

Unleash the power of the shadows, test your reflexes and wits, and reclaim the Stone of Life to save your village!


Key Features
* Create and control shadow clones with soul transfer mechanics.
* A deep mix of platforming, puzzles, and fast-paced combat.
* Helpful companions: Pochi the wise dog and Frogus the upgrade merchant.
* Epic boss battles, including the final fight against Doku.
70010000118525.intro: Reclaim the Stone of Life using the power of shadow clones!
70010000118525.name: Ninjora Echoes

70010000121405.description:
Take on one long, continuous obby set in a Japanese samurai world, filled with deadly platforms, precise jumps, and skill-based obstacles. Littered with checkpoints to keep you progressing — pure parkour as you make your way along the warrior’s path.

Features:

One long samurai-themed obby
Skill-based parkour gameplay
Tricky jumps and challenging obstacles
Japanese-inspired environments and visuals
Checkpoints throughout the course
Designed for players who enjoy classic obbies
70010000121405.intro: Do you have the discipline to conquer the Samurai Trial?
70010000121405.name: Samurai Obby

70010000119456.description:
Kamikaze Strike: FPV Drone pushes the boundaries of modern combat simulation, putting your piloting skills to the ultimate test in high-stakes, first-person kamikaze missions. This isn't just a game; it’s a high-octane descent into the future of electronic warfare, where your precision determines the outcome of the frontline.

Experience ultra-smooth, responsive drone controls engineered to mimic professional racing rigs. From the immersive FPV cockpit, you’ll navigate hostile, high-threat environments where every second counts. You aren't just flying—you are the weapon.
Master the Art of the Strike

Become a ghost in the machine as you weave through "dead zones." To reach your objective, you must:

    -Dodge Enemy Fire: Evade rapid-fire anti-air guns and small arms fire.

    -Neutralize Electronic Warfare: Navigate around signal jammers and radar arrays that threaten to kill your feed.

    -Precision Impact: Deliver devastating payloads by crashing directly into high-value military assets, including heavy tanks, mobile artillery units, and fortified enemy command centers.

Realistic Military Training & Progression

Before heading into the heat of battle, hone your craft in the Dedicated Training Grounds. This expansive training map is designed for pilots to master:

    -High-Speed Technical Flight: Push your motors to the limit through gate races and tight gaps.

    -Acrobatic Maneuvers: Practice power loops, dives, and sharp snaps to become unpredictable to enemy sensors.

    -Tactical Drills: Simulate approach runs on static targets to perfect your terminal velocity and impact angles.

The True Pilot Experience

With cutting-edge flight physics and a simulated analog/digital video feed, you will feel the weight, inertia, and adrenaline of a real-world drone operator. Every vibration and signal flicker pulls you deeper into the role of a modern elite pilot.

Kamikaze Strike delivers an authentic, gritty, and explosive blend of pilot skill and military strategy. The sky is no longer a limit—it’s your playground of destruction.
70010000119456.intro: Fly a kamikaze drone through fast-paced FPV missions. Dodge bullets, sneak past jammers and radars, and crash into tanks, troops, and enemy bases.
70010000119456.name: Kamikaze Strike:FPV Drone

70010000121468.description:
Wander through marble streets, towering amphitheaters, and bustling forums as you explore a sunlit city of stone and history. Every district hides landmarks waiting to be found!

Empire Hike is all about exploration, atmosphere, and discovery — rewarding curiosity and careful observation.

Features:
>Vast Rome-inspired imperial city
>Iconic landmarks and hidden locations to find
>Calm, immersive walking simulator gameplay
>Scenic viewpoints and secret spots
70010000121468.name: Empire Hike

70010000104639.description:
Explore the haunting, dreamlike fantasy world of BEFORE I GO, a punishing Metroidvania where you embody the innocence of an inner child on an allegorical odyssey towards death acceptance. The end is inevitable, but will you brave the journey?

The world is old and unwell. An ominous affliction has left every living soul weak, terrified and helpless before despair.
But this paralyzing infestation has left the innocence of a young child untainted.
Lost in limbo, an otherworldly journey awaits you. Find answers. Face your greatest fear. Confront reality.

BEFORE I GO depicts a contemplative reflection on existence and the transitory nature of life.
Lose yourself in this enigmatic tale. In adversity, find your way to deliverance and peace.

BEFORE I GO is a challenging side-scrolling action-platformer that distils the classic genre down to its most beloved aspects,
satisfying old-school platformer lovers and enthusiasts looking for fresh mechanics.

Key Features
 - Unconventional storytelling grounded in a genuine emotional tragedy.
 - Unique art style with a foreboding and melancholic atmosphere.
 - Explore a non-linear elaborate world; immerse yourself in a dreamlike universe.
 - Overcome meticulously crafted and intense platforming sections.
 - Withstand unforgiving parasitic abominations.
 - Assimilate powerful and dexterous abilities, sharpen your skills, and perfect the promptness of your actions.
 - Master intuitive, responsive, and diligently tuned controls.
70010000104639.intro: A punishing Metroidvania about death acceptance.
70010000104639.name: BEFORE I GO

70010000098841.description:
Outerloop Games delivers Dosa Divas - a spicy narrative turn-based RPG. After years apart, sisters Samara and Amani journey with their ancient spirit-mech on a mission to defeat a rotten fast food empire and reconnect communities with their traditions. Platform through vibrant villages, battle corporate goons, reconcile with loved ones, and eat one last meal together before saying goodbye.

TASTE VICTORY
Engage in a flavorful turn-based combat system where every attack packs some heat, especially when you time it right. Hitting the action button as the hit lands amplifies your attack damage and strengthens your blocks against enemy attacks.  Use boost points at the start of your turn to multiply damage on attacks and skills. Each character harnesses their Spirit Power to use a unique set of class-based abilities associated with one of five flavor profiles. Match enemy flavour cravings to break down their defenses and leave them stuffed. With each round, build up your Ultimate meter to use special group Ultimates and serve up some devastating damage. 

MECH-SPLORATION
Traverse unique villages in a customizable and upgradable ancient spirit-mech named Goddess. Double-jump, drill, and grapple your way through the world to discover local ingredients, hidden paths, memories, and new friends.

ORDER UP
Cook up made-to-order food to wake the people from a processed food-induced haze using the expressive cooking system. Forage, fish, and barter to collect ingredients and fire up orders for hungry villagers. Delivering delicious, hearty meals reconnects communities with their culture, history, and shared memories and increases your reputation. Developing a strong reputation comes with major perks and progression.

FIST FOOD
Fuel yourself in battle by having a quick bite to eat. Leverage the effects of ingredients to adjust recipes and create extra fragrant dishes that restore health, enhance damage, fortify defense, and replenish your Spirit Power.

MECH IT YOUR OWN
Serve up looks by customizing your spirit-mech, Goddess. Mix and match your mech’s body, arms, and legs. Create your own spicy style with custom wraps and accessories.
70010000098841.intro: Two sisters and a mech cook, bond, and fight corpos in a spicy turn-based RPG.
70010000098841.name: Dosa Divas

70010000118656.description:
A chill world of puzzling challenges awaits in Pengilo, a physics-driven platformer where you fling a bouncy penguin through charming winter landscapes. Across 50 levels, collect stars and grab the key to unlock the exit, mastering precision launches to escape every frosty challenge!

Bounce your penguin at least once and you’ll even be able to change directions midair, slowing down time and re-aiming to hit your target or avoid pitfalls and spike traps. Enjoy cozy and casual brainteasing gameplay at your own pace, all accompanied by a mellow soundtrack.

• Enjoy physics-based platforming across 50 puzzling stages.
• Fling your penguin with precision to reach the exit.
• Grab the key and collect stars along the way.
• Slow down time and change direction midair.
• Replay cleared stages to improve your skills.
70010000118656.intro: Bounce your penguin with precision as you master brainteasing stages in chill wintry style!
70010000118656.name: Pengilo

70010000061699.description:
Explore a mysterious island chain through the eyes of a tiny, but mighty, gecko in Gecko Gods - a serene puzzle-adventure built around curiosity and movement.

Wander freely through sun-soaked ruins, hidden caves, and ancient temples as you uncover the remnants of a lost civilization. Thanks to your gecko agility, you can scale walls, cling to ceilings, and reach areas no one else can. The world is your playground, and there's no wrong way to explore it.

Between puzzles and platforming challenges, relax by sailing your little wooden boat from one island to the next. Each stop offers new puzzles, secrets to uncover, insects to snack on, and peaceful moments to enjoy. There's no combat, no rush - just gentle adventure and a world full of quiet wonder.

Features:
- Climb, crawl, and cling with gecko-like movement
- Solve intuitive environmental puzzles
- Explore freely with no wrong turns or dead ends
- Sail across tranquil waters to discover unique islands
- Discover secrets and ancient history hidden across the archipelago
- Enjoy a relaxing, atmospheric world full of natural beauty

Whether you're in it for exploration, puzzles, or just peaceful vibes, Gecko Gods is a gentle journey from a uniquely tiny perspective.
70010000061699.intro:
Explore a forgotten land in Gecko Gods, a puzzle-adventure built for curiosity.
Climb, solve, and sail as you uncover the islands' past.
70010000061699.name: Gecko Gods

70010000114719.description:
Make mountains of trash disappear in seconds, and enjoy the satisfying feeling of turning messy spaces into organized and clean environments. This is a simple cozy game to unwind with, and spark some joy.

Vacuum, brush, mop, spray – there are many ways to make a place sparkling clean. As a new Cleaning Gig Worker, you will take on variety of requests - declutter a hoarded-up apartment, spiffy up old haunted mansion while avoiding ghosts, or solve puzzles in an ancient temple and find (and clean) the treasure room. Who knows, some of these might even seem familiar ;)

As you play, you will grow your prestige and earn cash, letting you upgrade your tools and purchase new outfits. Don't fret, the game is very low-pressure, and you can always revisit levels with improved tools to get better scores.

Most importantly, bring many derelict locations back to life, with your trusty broom and vacuum!
70010000114719.intro: Turn huge messes into sparkling spaces! The quick, cozy joy of tidying up!
70010000114719.name: Cleaning Up!

70010000116664.description:
Become the caretaker of an island full of silliness, drama, love and other surprises in Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream for Nintendo Switch!

Create all sorts of Mii characters based on your family and friends, someone you admire, or someone completely original! From their appearance to their personality traits and even little quirks, there are all sorts of ways to customise your Mii characters – including face parts that are unique to this game.

By picking up and placing Mii characters next to each other, they’ll start hanging out together. Watch as they forge unlikely friendships, get into fights, fall in (and out of) love unexpectedly, and so much more. 

Expand and design your island as you see fit. Place homes, shops, restaurants, and more to give your island residents new hang out spots to visit. Want to make your Mii characters feel at home? Decorate their rooms with different interior sets, including furniture, wallpaper and floors to match their vibe. 

The demo of this game may contain product placement and advertising.
70010000116664.intro: Your Mii characters, their wacky world!
70010000116664.name: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream

70010000120108.description: Decide which direction your athletes will run to maximize their performance. Only you can create a true dream team!
70010000120108.intro: Get your players on the field! Build the strongest team possible!
70010000120108.name: 2048 Boys

70010000120597.description:
Five Trials, Five Thrills

Kaguya’s Picture-Matching Puzzle
Fragments of yokai illustrations have been shattered. Rearrange the pieces correctly and restore them to their true forms.

Okiku’s Sorting Game
Bombs keep appearing one after another—sort them quickly before they explode! A moment of hesitation can be fatal.

Kaede’s Riding Training
Control a gently floating character and slip through narrow gaps between obstacles. Push your limits and see how far you can go.

Alice’s Orb Fusion Experiment
Stack identical characters together to evolve them, aiming for the highest score before the box overflows.

Setsuna’s Wish-Binding
Connect adorable yokai filling the screen in a single continuous stroke and wipe them out all at once. At the end of a massive chain awaits pure, exhilarating catharsis.

Collect the Truth of the World

Earn “Magic Stones” as rewards for clearing challenges, each one a fragment of the world itself. Spend the stones to unlock pieces of stories spanning time and space: Sengoku battlefields, distant galaxies, and mysterious yokai realms…

A Depth of Replayability

Quick and easy to jump into yet irresistibly addictive for those determined to collect every last Magic Stone. Conquer every mini-game and uncover all the intertwined destinies recorded in this “Chronicle of Illusions.”

Jump into the world of Hyakki today!
70010000120597.intro: A compact yet richly packed anthology of bite-sized games you can enjoy anytime.
70010000120597.name: Hyakki Fantasia Mini Game Selection VOL.1

70010000064851.description:
Evelius’s Tower awaits you, adventurers. Do you have what it takes to make it out alive?

DECEPTIVELY CHALLENGING
Lucky Tower Ultimate is an absurd adventure that will bamboozle you in its difficulty, while enchanting you with its absurdly funny charm. Be prepared to perish at the hands of the uncompromising Tower's traps and monsters countless times before you can even think about escaping to the local village - and only then can progression be earned.

IMPROVISE, LEARN, DIE
Embark on a quest with the delightfully narcissistic knight, Von Wanst, as he finds himself zapped into the perplexing Tower with no armor, weapons, or clear path to escape. Seek aid (and extra firepower) from a lovable cast of quirky companions. With each death, Von Wanst is transported back to the top of the randomly generated Tower to start again, ensuring that no two journeys are ever the same.

CHAOS, COMEDY, MYSTERY
Lucky Tower encourages improvisation, mastery, and learning as you play. Experiment with puzzles and enemies, and take your time to learn the twists and tricks of the Tower if you want to survive.

Lucky Tower Ultimate is infused with slapstick humor and a hand-drawn aesthetic, making each run feel like an immersive cartoon. As a continuation of the cult classic Flash game series about choosing between three mysterious doors, the Lucky Tower beckons seasoned fans and new players alike to experience the unique pleasure of getting all geared up... just to slip on a banana peel and die.

Features: 
• From broccoli to dead enemies, everything in the game can be used as a weapon
• A village for commerce, meta-progression, and a customizable home awaits you after you escape the tower
• Companions and enemies react to the way you treat them - friends turn to foes if you step on their toes, and villains can open doors for you if you help them out along the way
• Journey through the tower to find 200+ items, ranging from Golden Armor to a honk horn, and 40+ traps, like barrels of dynamite and bee hives
• Randomly generated levels and haircuts keeps every playthrough fresh
• Hand-drawn 2D graphics that feel like an immersive cartoon
• Full voice acting makes for kickin’ times and smashing punchlines
• Multiple ways to exit the tower, including a dark and atmospheric Cave
• Learn and experiment without limitations (or hand holding)
• Unlock companion quests by escaping the tower with them by your side
70010000064851.intro: Escape from an incredibly dangerous, randomly generated tower in a slapstick, roguelite adventure that looks like a cartoon and feels like a joke. Slashy slashy!
70010000064851.name: Lucky Tower Ultimate

70010000086742.description:
One day, without warning, you become a ghost. You lived an honest life and committed no wrongs, so your soul should surely find peace… right? But the thought of being separated from the one you love is more terrifying than the abyss itself. If you can no longer stay by his side, then you must bring him with you before your soul passes on. Torn between love and obsession, you struggle against fate in this dark, emotional pixel-art visual novel about devotion, loss, and the desperate choices made in the afterlife.

Decollate Decoration is a pixel-style visual novel adventure with point-and-click and command selection gameplay. As a girl who has become a ghost, you must influence your beloved through conversations, poltergeist activity, dream visits, and even curses. Because he lacks spiritual awareness, direct communication is nearly impossible, requiring careful experimentation and strategic choices. The branching narrative features six different endings, with each playthrough lasting around 15 minutes. Additionally, the game features a prologue and epilogue side stories, a save function, an ending list, and unlockable bonus illustrations, encouraging replayability and full completion.
70010000086742.intro: A haunting adventure where love lingers beyond death!
70010000086742.name: Decollate Decoration

70010000111798.description: ZPF is a retro-inspired horizontal shooter for the Sega Genesis/Mega Drive. Blast your way through a cosmic gauntlet of epic boss battles, addictive scoring, and hidden secrets in a thrilling arcade-style adventure through fantasy, sci-fi, and alien-themed worlds.
70010000111798.name: ZPF

70010000112316.description: You have been assigned to guard a dragon girl set to be executed at the end of 5 days and have the ability to kill her instantly at any time with the push of a button in this multi-ending visual novel.
70010000112316.intro:
If she tries anything shady or attempts to hurt you, 
push that button right in front of you.
It will execute her instantly.
70010000112316.name: 5omeday

70010000112569.description:
☆ Story
Vanilla, our very hungry protagonist, wanted to buy a cake but is completely broke!
After mocking from her childhood friend Chocolat, she sets out on an adventure to gather ingredients and bake a cake herself!

☆ Gameplay & Features
Defeat all enemies and keep the screen clean for 5 seconds to clear a stage.
A simple and easy-to-understand system!
Think about how you move and position yourself to find the best strategy.
A huge experience with 100 action-packed stages!

The "Pixel Game Maker Series" is a series of games created using the action game creation software "Pixel Game Maker MV" that can be enjoyed on the Nintendo Switch™.
70010000112569.intro:
Blast enemies away with magic shots and smash them into walls to defeat them!
A top-down, fixed-screen 2D action game!
70010000112569.name: Pixel Game Maker Series MagicalShot The AttackBump☆

70010000113942.description:
Enter a broken world where every decision shapes your survival.

Apocalypse Day: Survival Z – Craft & Build is a third-person survival adventure set in a stylized post-apocalyptic Southwest United States. From abandoned cities in Arizona to dense forests in Utah, ruined farmlands in Texas, and the unforgiving deserts of New Mexico, each region presents new dangers and new opportunities.

Exploration and crafting are the core of the experience. Resources are limited, and combat is only one part of survival. Scavenge destroyed buildings, empty malls, hunting cabins, farms, greenhouses, bunkers, and mines to gather wood, metal, tools, car parts, and rare materials. Use what you find to craft weapons, tools, shelters, medical supplies, and survival gear.

Develop your abilities through action. Increase Strength to carry heavier equipment and handle tougher fights. Improve Fitness to run longer and endure harsh conditions. Refine Dexterity for better precision and faster reactions. Master skills like Carpentry, Metalworking, First Aid, Cooking, Farming, and Hunting to create sustainable ways to survive in a hostile world.

Each area introduces new threats. Slow but numerous infected roam city streets. Wild animals stalk forest paths. Stronger farm mutants guard open fields. In the desert, mutated enemies grow more aggressive under extreme heat. Harsh weather, limited water, and environmental hazards force you to think before you act.

Survival is not about rushing into danger. It’s about preparing, adapting, and building smarter than the world around you.

In Apocalypse Day, the end has already come.
Now it’s your turn to endure.
70010000113942.intro: The apocalypse doesn’t forgive the unprepared.
70010000113942.name: Apocalypse Day: Survival Z - Craft & Build

70010000116039.description:
Fix & Flip Dream House is interior renovation and design simulator. Step into the shoes of a professional decorator: purchase old properties, clear out the clutter, and transform them into stylish, modern living spaces. Your goal is to completely reinvent the interior by selecting finishing materials, furniture from an extensive catalogue. Painting walls, laying floors, and arranging furniture — every decision you make directly impacts the final value of the home.

Key features:

- Full Renovation Cycle: Buy abandoned properties, demolish old partitions, and completely transform the look of the premises.

- Interior Design and Finishing: A vast catalogue of materials and furniture allows you to paint walls, hang wallpaper, and arrange elements to your taste.

- A Jack of All Trades: Use and upgrade arsenal of tools to speed up your workflow.
70010000116039.name: Fix & Flip Dream House

70010000121602.description:
Stroll through charming streets, blooming gardens, and hidden corners as you uncover everything the village has to offer. Every path invites discovery, and every detail tells a story of life, leisure, and sunlight.

Sunrock Lake focuses on peaceful exploration — no rush, no pressure — just wandering and finding the village’s secrets.

Features:

>Bright, sunny village environments

>Search-and-find exploration gameplay

>Hidden spots to discover

>Relaxing, atmospheric world
70010000121602.name: Sunrock Lake

70010000112710.description:
Brawl your way through the streets and mall in the View Askewniverse as Jay and Silent Bob where you unleash a dizzying array of irreverent combos, special moves, collect and summon assists, in this over-the-top beat ‘em up. You’ll need to harness every ounce of smoke-fueled creativity to get past the throngs of hockey-stick wielding teenage thugs, dookie demons, hipsters with babies, old grumpy danglers and massive, movie-inspired boss battles. 

Jay and Silent Bob: Chronic Blunt Punch combines incredible stylized, hand drawn animation, character design, and over the top combat and badass catchphrases in a side-scrolling, tag-team, beat-’em-up. Our heroes embark on an epic adventure from their humble, suburban New Jersey Quick Stop to an unearthed mystical mall that has unleashed an evil hold on the city.

No matter if you play solo and tag swap between characters or with your hetero lifemate in couch co-op, you’ll be performing special moves and outrageous combos. 

Developed with the full blessing, enthusiasm and voice-acting quips from Jason Mewes and Kevin Smith themselves, Chronic Blunt Punch gives players the ultimate, profound, and profane Jay and Silent Bob experience.

Features

- Hand-Drawn Art and Animation: Incredibly detailed, expressive and highly inspired hand-drawn animations.

- Insane combos: Bust out a cornucopia of irreverent special moves and combos that link together to create explosive finishers.

- Super Moves: Build up your super meter to launch video game inspired super attacks or save up your super meter and transform Jay and Silent Bob into Bluntman and Chronic to freeze time and deliver a devastating attack.

- Local Co-Op: Play solo or with your hetero lifemate with two-player couch co-op. Tag you’re it, snackpack.

- Cameo-palooza: During your journey, interact with cameo characters from the Viewaskewniverse and call them in to help you during intense moments.
70010000112710.intro: Play solo or with your hetero lifemate in this hand drawn, arcade style, side-scrolling beat-em-up blessed by Jay and Silent Bob themselves.
70010000112710.name: Jay and Silent Bob: Chronic Blunt Punch

70010000079019.description:
A HANDCRAFTED DYNAMIC ADVENTURE
Traverse an interconnected world and cross paths with factions, each with their own agenda. Use your wits to learn different ways to traverse the sinking city, and in turn discover many possible outcomes for its denizens depending on your actions and choices.

CUT DOWN AN EXPANSIVE ARRAY OF FOES
While you might make a few friends during this dangerous journey, far more foes stand in your way. Find and utilize a variety of weapons to clash with an defeat all manner of man and monsters. Shift your allegiances to different factions when convenient.

AQUIRE FORBIDDEN POWERS AND SECRETS
There are many secret abilities discover as you journey to the eternal lighthouse. But the power to alter your form and traverse the world may have a heavy price.
70010000079019.intro:
YOUR CHOICES RESHAPE A LIVING CITY. 
Explore a sprawling metropolis, wield mysterious powers, and uncover the secrets of the Eternal Lighthouse.
70010000079019.name: Foreign Sun

70010000101045.description:
In a dark world, a new adventure begins. Explore maps, level up powers, kill monsters. Find treasures. 

From the somehow triple-BAFTA‑winning creators of Vampire Survivors, Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors turns the snowballing thrill of Survivors into a hyper turn‑based, card‑driven BLOBBER with rogue-lite elements. Build busted decks, explore familiar dungeons from a new perspective, and unleash world‑ending combos. Either take your time and be tactical, or play turns as fast as you humanly can: The outcome is always accurate, we call it hyper for a reason! 

What is this game about 
Snowballing, turn‑based carnage: Play cards in ascending mana order to land combos; each step multiplies the next card’s effect. Use Wilds to extend the stack and keep going to 10, 20, 30… Can you reach infinite? 
Pick your pace: Either take your time and be tactical, or play turns as fast as you humanly can: The outcome is always accurate, we call it hyper for a reason! 
Deck-Building: Accumulate experience and level up to gain new cards, headbutt chests for customization gems and power‑ups; chase weapon evolutions and summon survivors to trigger cascade of effects and break the game. 
Crawling: Explore multi‑floor dungeons packed with something seldom seen in Vampire Survivors: functioning walls. And then all sorts of unique treasures and interactions. Find the shovel to dig into the next floor, that will most likely take place in the clouds! 

Starting Tips: 
- Try different Crawlers, each one changes your deck. 
- Visit the village after every run and remember to buy Power-Ups. 
- Play cards in ascending mana to trigger combos.
70010000101045.name: Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors

70010000117732.description:
Get ready for GluMe, a sliding puzzle game where you control a slime, and any friends you pick up along the way. Move through top-down grid stages, collecting gems across 80 unique puzzles of growing size and complexity.

New challenges keep appearing: sleeping gray slimes wake when touched, turning blue and sticking to you. Use them to cross pitfalls, but don’t grow too big to fit into tight spots. Find the right order to collect gems and uncover secrets. Reset anytime if you get stuck. Enjoy chiptune tunes and retro vibes!

• Move around puzzling stages and collect gems to advance.
• Run into other slimes to wake them up and stick together.
• Use your slimes’ changing shape to get around obstacles.
• Master 80 unique levels presented in retro pixel art style.
• Revisit cleared stages to find secrets you’ve missed.
70010000117732.intro: Stick together to solve brainteasing stages in retro sliding puzzle style!
70010000117732.name: GluMe

70010000098099.description:
Love food truck cooking games? Get ready to unleash your inner chef with Food Truck Chef! Join Emily on a global culinary journey, preparing mouthwatering recipes from tacos and sushi to pizza and beyond!
 
Food Truck Chef is an exciting, fast-paced cooking and management game where your culinary dreams come to life on wheels! Start with a humble food truck where you'll prepare meals, satisfy customers, and work your way up to transform it into the ultimate foodie hotspot! 
 
Master the kitchen
Upgrade your food truck, serve hungry customers, and become a top chef! Time management is key as you cook, serve, and manage your way to success.
 
Explore the world
Discover 19+ exciting locations, each with unique dishes to master. From the bustling food streets of Asia to the vibrant flavors of Mexico, there's always a new kitchen challenge to tackle.
 
Key features
• Endless fun: Hundreds of levels, dishes, and upgrades to keep you entertained.
• Addictive gameplay: Easy to learn, with fast-paced cooking game mechanics.
• Colorful visuals: Enjoy lively, engaging art that brings each food truck scene to life.
70010000098099.intro: Manage and build your Food Truck! Cook global dishes, upgrade your kitchen, and serve hungry customers in this fast-paced cooking game
70010000098099.name: Food Truck Chef - Full Course Edition

70010000100981.description:
The black dragon [Guernian], who once faced down the gods, has fallen. 
From the rift he fled before his death, an unholy energy has spread across the world, and life is undergoing a bizarre mutation. People call it Corruption and live their days in fear, but few know its trustworthy source and full extent.

You are an immortal warrior, a so-called Successor, chosen by the God of Light [Lu], the God of Fire [Ashuran], and the God of Water [Harnia]. Arriving in Cliffshire, a town of light, Successors must head to a burial ground where demons are said to be manifesting and follow clues to cleanse the distorted world.

Dragon is Dead delivers 2D platformer action requiring precise dodging and pattern-breaking. Each area is a vertically and horizontally intertwined, multi-layered structure that regenerates in a rogue-lite fashion with different terrain, monster placement, and loot composition on each run. When you die, you lose your gold and temporary buffs, but your gear and runes are permanently preserved and become the basis for the next cycle. Defeating bosses yields rune stones that can be used to craft or awaken legendary gear, and artifacts found during exploration can bring both powerful blessings and dangerous curses depending on the combination, providing new tactical tension each time.

Make your way to the Citadel – the closer you get, the more you’ll come face-to-face with a secret that has brought the world to its knees.

Features:

•	Tight, immersive platforming and combat
•	Stunning visuals to draw you into the world
•	Each run brings new challenges as you gain strength
•	Extensive customization and character options for exciting builds
•	Conquer the Corruption to unravel the story
70010000100981.intro: Amid spreading Corruption, the immortal Successor walks a fated path.
70010000100981.name: Dragon Is Dead

70010000103744.description:
An all-new title from Demon Artist Kazuma Kaneko, the visionary mind behind a legacy of groundbreaking games.

Tokyo, 20XX. The colossal bay area megastructure, "THE HASHIRA," has been severed from the outside world. You are a "Tsukuyomi," an elite agent of a national defense organization. Your mission: Infiltrate the isolation zone, battle through a tower overrun by eldritch "Jinma," and ascend to the summit to uncover the terrifying truth.
20XX

Razor-Sharp Strategy: "Jinma Card" Battles
Engage in intense turn-based card combat where every decision carries weight. With a strict hand limit of just three cards, you must carefully manage your resources. Read the enemy’s telegraphed attacks and choose your path: use your "Jinma Cards" to strike, or hold them in hand to bolster your defenses? Every successful battle grants you a choice of a new Jinma card to add to your current deck, opening up endless strategic deck building possibilities. Experience a battle system that is streamlined, fast-paced, and deceptively deep.

A Gripping Story Where Myth and Reality Collide
A multi-perspective saga of four "Tsukuyomi" agents, each walking a divergent path. Switch between characters to experience their conflicting convictions and personal battles. Only by reaching the summit will you uncover the colossal truth hidden within THE HASHIRA.

Forge a Unique Arsenal Through Every Decision
Your decisions during exploration directly shape the properties of special "Creation Cards" that are earned and added to your deck over the course of your exploration. Even if you fall in battle, these cards are not lost to the void. Instead, you retain the chance to reclaim them in future runs. Through repeated cycles of death and rebirth, your deck expands and evolves, allowing you to craft a build that is uniquely yours.
70010000103744.intro: Ancient myths awaken in a modern-day Babel. A tactical deck-building tower dungeon RPG from the legendary Demon Artist, Kazuma Kaneko.
70010000103744.name: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUKUYOMI

70010000111243.description:
Kingdom's Return is an action RPG where you'll adventure to restore your fallen kingdom. Collect materials in 2D side-scrolling adventure stages, then use them in the strategy part to rebuild your kingdom and power up your characters!

*Story
In a world of swords, magic, and fairies, you are a lone adventurer who suddenly becomes tasked to revive the ruined kingdom of Almacia along with the Fairy of Time, Chronos.
Through adventure (action) and revival (strategy), restore the kingdom to its former glory!

*Action and Strategy
Kingdom's Return combines action with strategy for an addictive hybrid experience!
In adventure stages, you'll collect items for construction in the strategy part, all while levelling up your kingdom and characters.
You can approach each side in balance, or concentrate primarily on just one and still clear the game.

*The build of your dreams!
As you fill the land with buildings, the characters you take on adventures will also grow stronger.
Build the kingdom of your dreams and strengthen your allies!

*The playable cast is brimming with personality!
Start your adventure by choosing from "Imperial", "Wizard", "Alchemist", and "Zipangu".
Each has unique stats, skills and attacks, so choose the one that fits your action style!
You can change characters while in your kingdom, so you'll always have a variety of styles to choose from!

*Adventure in an idyllic fantasy world!
In Kingdom's Return, you'll build your cozy fantasy kingdom and bravely adventure into dungeons.
Get quests from villagers, build up your lands, and play around with powerful bosses!
This is your kingdom to rebuild how you want!
70010000111243.intro: A kingdom-rebuilding adventure filled with action and strategy!
70010000111243.name: Kingdom's Return: Time-Eating Fruit and the Ancient Monster

70010000118600.description:
No need for expensive lessons or a bulky piano!
Joy Piano is an "Edutainment" game designed to help children build a solid musical foundation and feel the thrill of performing world-famous songs.

■ Master the Basics: 23-Step Curriculum
From rhythm and note reading to two-handed play and chords! Following our 23 structured lessons makes mastering piano basics natural and fun. Achieve the grand finale—playing "Canon"!

■ 20 Beloved Global Classics & Nursery Rhymes
Featuring 20 hits like "Twinkle Twinkle Little Star," "Chopsticks," and "Old MacDonald Had a Farm." Playing familiar tunes boosts confidence and focus.

■ 2 Guided Learning Modes

Note Mode: A visual, intuitive way to learn rhythm by following falling notes.

Sheet Music Mode: A practical mode to learn key positions by reading real notes.

Speed Control: Adjust the tempo to match your child's pace so they can finish every song with a smile.
70010000118600.intro:
The Perfect Start to Your Child's Musical Journey.
From basic notes to Canon, learn to play like magic through fun gameplay!
70010000118600.name: Joy Piano

70010000119547.description:
Reptilian Rising is a retro-style, turn-based strategy RPG where history’s greatest heroes take on the most ridiculous crisis time has ever seen. Assemble a squad of legends – from Cleopatra and Robin Hood to Einstein – and fight across randomly generated battlefields, from prehistoric jungles to dystopian futures.

Harness time-based powers to clone your troops, summon reinforcements, or open time gates for rapid deployment. Face bizarre Reptilian foes including dino-cyborgs, Manborgs, and the ultimate villain: the Dictatorsaur.

With reactive combat, over 20 playable heroes, and branching missions, no two runs are ever the same. Save humanity in style. Open the door, get on the floor… and shoot the dinosaur!

Key Features
- Turn-based squad tactics with reactive combat twists
- 20+ iconic heroes to recruit from history, myth, and beyond
- Dozens of outrageous reptilian enemies and 9 unique boss fights
- Strategic upgrade system including artefacts, cloning, time gates and more
- High replayability through mission branching and bonus objectives
- Digitally realised ‘80s tabletop-inspired aesthetic
70010000119547.name: Reptilian Rising

70010000120101.description: Gather and eat as much food as you can until you can't stand it anymore. Find a secluded corner and show everyone what you've got. Just don't get caught by the guards!
70010000120101.intro: Don't get caught by the guards, you little vandal!
70010000120101.name: Poopy Time

70050000069093.description:
This add-on content grants access to special "Creation Cards" for use in-game.

“Pack Contents”
- Shiva
- Hathor
- Nephthys
- Orcus
- Khonsu

Note: Also included in a bundle. Please avoid duplicate purchases. Content available immediately in-game.
70050000069093.name: KAZUMA KANEKO: Refined Arts Pack vol.1

70050000071173.description: Adds a playable character skin from the "Azure Striker Gunvolt" series.
70050000071173.name: "Azure Striker Gunvolt" Crossover Character Skin

70070000033463.description:
The Digital Deluxe Edition is a bundle that includes the base game and additional content. A Standard Edition containing only the base game is also available. Please take care not to make duplicate purchases.

"Bundle Contents"
- KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUKUYOMI(Base Game)
- DLC KAZUMA KANEKO: Refined Arts Pack vol.1
70070000033463.intro: Ancient myths awaken in a modern-day Babel. A sleek, tactical deck-building tower dungeon from the legendary Demon Artist, Kazuma Kaneko.
70070000033463.name: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUKUYOMI Digital Deluxe Edition

70010000104052.description:
Build your own home on wheels and live sustainably off-grid. Craft workstations and power supplies, source energy from the sun, wind, or water, upgrade and customize your vehicle, grow crops, and explore a colorful world with up to 4 players.

Outbound is an open-world exploration game set in a utopian near future. Start with an empty camper van and turn it into the home of your dreams - alone or together with your friends. Build and explore at your own pace. Scavenge materials, craft, and build in and on top of your vehicle with modular parts. Advance in technology and efficiently use energy to power your home. Adjust your playstyle to adapt to new landscapes and changing environmental conditions.

Source Energy
Power your electric camper van with energy from the sun, wind, or water.

Build
Build your moving base with a modular building system. Customize your vehicle with paint, decorations, and furniture to create your own perfect cozy place.

Grow
Create gardens to nurture delicate and delicious plants and mushrooms. Eat them raw or cook delicious meals to refill your needs.

Craft
Craft workstations and tools from resources provided by Mother Nature. Research advanced technology to refine and combine them into new materials.

Play together
Explore a colorful open world with a variety of biomes, resources, and secrets, together with your friends. Play Outbound alone or with up to 4 players cooperatively.
70010000104052.intro: Build a home on wheels and live sustainably off-grid. Craft, forage & power your vehicle, sourcing energy from the elements. Explore a colorful world with up to 4 players.
70010000104052.name: Outbound

70010000107033.description:
Game Overview
In Sky Escort, you take on the role of a mercenary navigating treacherous skies to deliver high-stakes cargo. To survive relentless pirate raids, you must fortify your airship with defensive structures, upgrade your vessel in outpost cities, and recruit a legendary crew.

【Build & Manage】
In the resource-scarce void of the sky, survival is up to you. Allocate limited resources to build economic facilities on your hull, boosting productivity to fund your defenses. Balancing economic growth with combat readiness is the ultimate key to victory.

【Defend Against Foes】
Sky pirates are constantly circling, waiting for a chance to plunder your cargo. Equip your ship with automated weaponry to repel approaching enemies. However, building space is strictly limited. As Captain, you must decide which weapons to prioritize and how to position them for maximum efficiency. Fail to hold the line, and you’ll lose more than just the cargo—you’ll lose the ship and your life.

【Deck-Building】
Sky Escort is a card-driven experience where you build and refine your deck as you play. Unlike traditional turn-based card games, it features real-time combat. You must think on your feet, rapidly playing cards and adjusting your strategy in the heat of battle for a truly pulse-pounding experience.

【Recruit & Upgrade】
No captain survives alone. Bolster your strength by recruiting specialized crew members at outpost cities along your route. Each crew member brings unique abilities to the table, and you can further hone their skills through training at the Academy. Beyond the crew, your ship is your fortress—customize and upgrade multiple ship sections with a variety of specialized components to suit your playstyle.

【Diverse Factions】
Explore the world of Sky Escort through the lens of different factions, each featuring unique mechanics and playstyles:

The Empire: Rulers of the sky through sheer force. They boast immense commercial and industrial power, fueled by a subjugated labor force.
Panda Sages: Masters of "Chi Manipulation." They wield potent spells and find strength in maintaining the perfect balance between Yin and Yang.
The Wanderers: Outcasts exiled by the Empire. They are creative survivalists who deploy advanced combat robots to fight their battles.
70010000107033.intro: Sky Escort is a Roguelike deck-builder blending management and tower defense. As an airborne escort, defend your cargo through treacherous skies to claim your rewards.
70010000107033.name: Sky Escort

70070000033541.description:
Speed takes many forms — sometimes on asphalt, sometimes above the city skyline.

In this experience, control and precision define every challenge. Push powerful racing machines to their limits on demanding circuits, then switch perspective and take flight through a living city as you pilot advanced delivery drones under constant pressure. 

Behind the wheel, Auto Sport Racing Simulator delivers fast-paced circuit racing built around clean lines, responsive handling, and progression-driven competition.
Above the streets, Drone Delivery – FPV Simulator challenges you in a completely different way. Pilot high-tech drones through urban environments filled with obstacles, traffic, and dynamic conditions.

From ground-level racing to high-speed aerial navigation, this experience blends intensity, progression, and mastery into one continuous journey. 

Auto Sport Racing Simulator

Auto Sport Racing Simulator delivers a pure, skill-driven racing experience where every corner and straight matters. Race across a variety of carefully designed tracks, each offering its own rhythm and challenge—from tight technical sections to long, high-speed runs.
Upgrade and tune your vehicles to match your racing style, unlocking new performance parts and expanding your garage as you progress through events. 

Main Features:
- Competitive circuit racing with diverse track layouts
- Vehicle upgrades and performance tuning
- Multiple race types and progression-based events
- Unlockable cars and new environments
- Smooth handling and immersive visuals

Drone Delivery – FPV Simulator

Drone Delivery – FPV Simulator puts you in control of a professional delivery drone in a living city full of movement and challenges. Fly through streets, buildings, and tight spaces while completing time-critical deliveries ranging from food to urgent supplies.
Realistic FPV controls, battery management, and environmental challenges demand precise navigation and smart planning. 

Main Features:
- Realistic FPV drone flight physics
- Delivery missions with time and accuracy goals
- Dynamic city environments and weather conditions
- Upgradeable drone systems and equipment
- Expanding city districts with increasing difficulty

Stay focused, adapt to every challenge, and prove your control—no matter where the action takes you.
70070000033541.intro: Speed on the ground. Precision in the air.
70070000033541.name: Auto Sport Racing & DRONE DELIVERY - FPV SIMULATOR

70010000095039.description:
Experience a timeless chapter in the storied RPG franchise making its debut on Nintendo Switch™, filled with duplicitous schemes, treacherous geography, and secretive characters. As the adventure that immediately follows the events of Ys X, and which laid the groundwork for gameplay systems that would be seen in Ys VIII and beyond, Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta is a special opportunity to go deeper into the series history and see the evolution that continues to drive its remarkable longevity. 

Explore and map out your way across a dangerous landscape, taking advantage of a unique tag-team party combat system that allows for creativity and strategy. Seek the truth of Adol’s past against the musical backdrop of a refreshed soundtrack. Re-awaken the spirit of adventure, exclusively on Nintendo Switch, in Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta.


Exhilarating Party-based Action
Strategic party battles challenge you to change your tactics on the fly, and allies can pick up new abilities in the midst of battle that can help you gain the advantage against powerful enemies.

Dynamic Exploration of a Dangerous Land
Celceta is a vast and mysterious land, filled with interesting people and thrilling adventures. Take advantage of a robust mapping system as you discover all the challenges and rewards that await.

Enhanced Musical Experience 
The sweeping score guiding Adol's journey through Celceta returns, along with a newly recorded, re-interpreted version, allowing players to choose their own auditory adventure.
70010000095039.name: Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta
ratingContent: Mild fantasy violence and coarse language

70010000116468.description:
CyberBlocker Complete Edition is a brick-breaking action puzzler with shoot’em up elements. Maneuver twin ships to ricochet an orb into enemy blocks and clear the battlefield while dodging incoming fire and collecting power-up capsules.

Aim for higher scores as ball speed increases. Keep it in play, combine your reflective ships for an even wider shield and face off against massive bosses across 5 unique stages. Enjoy unlimited replay value and push your skills further in Challenge Mode!

• Effectively control 2 ships at once.
• Break blocks while evading enemy fire and collecting power-ups.
• Strategically combine ships on-the-fly to increase shield size.
• Keep the orb in play as it ricochets around the stage.
• Enjoy old-school arcade gameplay or push your skills in Challenge Mode.
70010000116468.intro: Engage in classic arcade style brick-breaking action with a shoot’em up twist!
70010000116468.name: CyberBlocker Complete Edition

70010000112226.description:
Perennial Dusk -Kinsenka- is a visual novel presented by Yukito Urushibara (Planning & Story) and Saine (Character Design & Art).

Sai suffers from a persistent numbness in his heart and lives only to protect his little sister... That is, until a fateful meeting with a girl named Matsuri. In a twilight world where the dead and the living mingle, a group of boys and girls face the imminent threat of beings known as Maledicts. Growing little by little, they experience the bittersweetness of life and the warmth of human connection.

■About This Game
・Unpredictable twists, written by Yukito Urushibara, will keep you on the edge of your seat like a mystery thriller!
・An intricate story with themes exploring life and dead—highly recommended for visual novel fans!
・Charming characters drawn by Saine!
・The theme song by Mao Uesugi and beautiful background music by Fuminori Matsumoto & Hitoshi Fujima (Elements Garden) perfectly complement the story!
・No branching paths—enjoy it even in Auto Play!
・Includes a chapter selection feature so you can start from your favorite scenes!
・Full HD support for gorgeous graphics!

■Main Characters
Matsuri (CV: Manaka Iwami)
A girl born into the Benio Family, a powerful family of Maledict Exorcists, who is tightly bound by her family's curse. Due to an incident in the past, causing her to close off her heart, she doesn't speak and barely shows any emotion. She is a Curse Bearer with the ability to give Maledicts form and use their powers freely.

Nobody (CV: Manaka Iwami)
Another personality that dwells inside Matsuri's heart who takes over when she is asleep. She can be incredibly selfish, and her words, actions, and strong attitude cause her to come across as a haughty, ill-mannered girl.

■Story
"The human heart is but a vessel for pain."

That's what someone once whispered—a voice laced with loneliness, whispering directly into the soul. It's an indescribable sadness, a love just beginning to bloom. It becomes an invisible pain that pierces the heart. And that's what makes up life: a cyclical series of highs and lows.

Tachibana Sai was born without the ability to feel pain in his heart. He spends his days eliminating any seeds of malice that sneak up on his sister, the one person he treasures, without drawing attention to himself.

Sick of the never-ending monotony he lives through, he chances upon a meeting with Benio Matsuri, a young girl whose aloof demeanor resembles that of a beautifully crafted doll.

For the first time in his life, he encounters a heart-piercing sensation—that of falling in love.

On the edge between day and night, in a twilight world where the dead and living mingle, stands an apartment building called Maison sans Nom, which is home to a group of boys and girls.

A ruthless boy who knows no pain in his heart.
A lonely girl without any friends.
A friendly girl who struggles to make connections.
A prickly, ambitious girl who is keen to be of help.
A boy who loves his own cute self above anything else.
A mess of a woman who tries to solve everything through brute force.
And a boy with a tender heart who knows no pain in his body.

This ill-assorted group of residents, hands stained with blood from battling the Maledicts, shall encounter the hearts they never knew and begin nurturing their souls.

The human heart is but a vessel for pain.

To protect this pain akin to love... To gently break the world apart, piece by piece... Even if it means abandoning humanity. That's why the heart is but a vessel for pain.

For life blazes brilliantly, while the heart goes around in an endless cycle.
70010000112226.intro: A visual novel about how the human heart endures relentless violence and limitless cruelty.
70010000112226.name: Perennial Dusk -Kinsenka-

70010000103436.description:
Winx Club: The Magic is Back captures the essence of the Winx universe, delivering an enchanting experience with a mix of magical combat, puzzle-solving, and cooperative gameplay with a friend. Play as all six members of the Winx Club, each with their own magical abilities.

KEY FEATURES
 
Play as Your Favorite Fairies
Play as all six members of the Winx Club, tailoring your experience based on your preferred character and their abilities. Freely switch between all five of the Winx while playing.

Explore Iconic Settings from the Winx Universe
Attend Alfea College and journey to familiar and distinct Winx locations, including The Enchanted Forest, The Coastal Cliffs, and The Desert Ruins of Red Fountain.

Winx Action in Your Hands
Engage in combat against fantasy creatures, where you’ll use each character’s unique magical abilities to bring peace to the lands. Upgrade spells to strengthen your fairies for even more fun.

Play with a Friend
With two-player local co-op, you and a friend can enjoy Winx Club together!
70010000103436.intro: Play as your favorite Winx in this brand new adventure.
70010000103436.name: Winx Club: The Magic is Back

70010000106653.description:
Dungeon Clawler mixes deck-building with a dash of roguelike mechanics and most importantly: a claw machine.

To improve his fortune in gambling, the evil dungeon lord has chopped off your left rabbit paw and wears it as a charm. Replacing your lost limb with a trusty claw, you fight your way through the dungeon to reclaim what's yours!

Instead of drawing cards from a deck, your items are physically dropped into a claw machine. Each turn you operate the claw to grab items — what you grab determines your actions for that turn. Size and material matter: larger items give the claw more to grip, while different materials unlock special synergies with your claws and perks.

Find new items and add them to your machine to create game-changing builds. Earn gold coins to upgrade or modify your items and unlock powerful new synergies. You will need to use every trick up your sleeve to reach the evil dungeon lord’s lair at the heart of the dungeon and reclaim your lost paw.

• The ultimate claw machine roguelike experience — control the claw in real time to grab weapons, shields, and items
• Choose from multiple unique characters, each with their own strengths, weaknesses, and special abilities
• Multiple difficulty levels and unlockable lucky paws to customise your run
• Break the game — go crazy with different claw and item synergies
• Venture into mystery locations and discover treasures and dangerous obstacles
• Spend your hard-earned coins in the dungeon’s pachinko machines
• Meet different characters who might help you on your journey
70010000106653.intro: A roguelike claw machine deckbuilder. Grab weapons, discover powerful synergies, and unleash crazy combos!
70010000106653.name: Dungeon Clawler

70010000112292.description:
Horticular is a relaxing garden-builder that begins with mysterious gnomes summoning you. Their wish? For you to breathe new life into a long-lost garden, abandoned by its previous caretaker.

Enter a magical world where you build up and expand a lush garden at your own pace. In your journey, you attract adorable animals to inhabit every corner; uncover helpful upgrades; and assist quirky characters for rewards and story development—all while juggling decay and fending off corruption sent by your nemesis!

Creative Freedom:
Build and expand the garden of your dreams with hundreds of unlockable surface types and items. You set the pace and what to do next, whether it be developing a new vegetable area, progressing a lucrative story arch, or just sitting back and admiring your creation.

Animal Ecosystem:
Create and preserve animal habitats to attract adorable creatures. Each species has its own requirements to fulfill before they pay you a visit, so you have to plan ahead if you want them all. Should you not take proper care of your inhabitants, they may leave you in pursuit of better luck elsewhere!

Immersive World:
Immerse yourself in your personal garden diorama, complete with a day-night cycle and weather effects. But while a rainy and lantern-lit evening may be cozy, it is not just for show! You will find that darkness attracts unsavory characters, some animals prefer specific weather conditions, and lightning strikes loom under stormy skies.

Maintaining Magic:
Nurture your garden with magic. Over time, you will have to deal with unhappy animals, garden decay, and corrupted agents sent by your nemesis. But with a combination of helpful gnomes and your own magical gloves, you are sure to keep an everblooming environment.

Garden Upgrades:
